overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character in a long coat walking along snow-dusted railroad tracks through a rocky mountain canyon at night. The scene features cinematic blue-hour lighting and high-quality game engine graphics reminiscent of an open-world Western adventure game.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain railroad track through rocky canyon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railroad tracks through the mountain canyon, following the curve of the rails

entered.detail: wooden railroad ties with metal rails curving through the canyon center
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising on the left side
steep rocky cliff face with dark crevices on the right side
patchy snow and frost covering the gravel ballast alongside the tracks
snow-capped mountain silhouette visible through the canyon gap ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along snow-dusted railroad tracks cutting through a narrow mountain canyon at night. Rocky cliffs rise on both sides while the tracks curve gently ahead toward a distant snow-capped peak, with blue moonlight casting shadows across the frozen gravel and sparse vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a frozen railway that winds deeper into a desolate mountain canyon under a midnight sky. It begins by tracking a character in a long coat walking steadily along snow-dusted tracks, where the cold blue moonlight casts deep shadows across the frozen gravel. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts to emphasize the towering rocky cliffs that hem in the path on both sides. The scene then opens up as the tracks curve gently forward, finally revealing a distant, jagged snow-capped peak looming against the horizon.
